title: SOP
seedPrompt: Map a standard operating procedure for our team. Include the trigger, each step in order, who owns each step, and how we know the process is complete.
diagramMermaid:
flowchart TD
  Start([Start]) --> Define[Define procedure]
  Define --> Execute[Execute steps]
  Execute --> Review{Review OK?}
  Review -->|Yes| End([End])
  Review -->|No| Execute
